summary.what: Repair integration test scaffolding for current timbers semantics
summary.why: commitEntry helper and SameDayEntries filename assumption both predated v0.17/v0.18 changes (auto-commit + filename-safe encoding); rot was hiding under the //go:build integration tag so 'just test' never noticed. Repairing them now restores the regression net before any pending-detection algorithm changes
summary.how: commitEntry tolerates 'nothing to commit' when working tree is clean post-timbers-log; SameDayEntries applies the colon→dash IDToFilename transform when constructing expected paths
